failures.description: The agent misinterpreted the ProductCatalogSearch result and answered that item 1507389580 at $1157.86 was the cheapest, despite the tool output showing item 5339029584 at $1128.99 was cheaper.
failures.checklist_reasoning: The user's goal was to identify the cheapest available Smartphone. The correct tool call was made and returned two available smartphones sorted by ascending price: item 5339029584 at $1128.99, then item 1507389580 at $1157.86. At step 4, the Executor synthesized an answer that contradicts the tool output by selecting the higher-priced item as cheapest. This is not an invocation problem, underspecification, or unsupported intent; the relevant evidence was already available and was misread.
